hook: BMI might not tell you the whole story about your health.

script.hook: Most people think BMI is a reliable health metric.
beats: But it fails to account for body composition, missing critical factors like muscle mass and visceral fat.
DEXA scans provide a clearer picture, measuring lean mass, fat distribution, and bone density.
These factors are independently linked to longevity, revealing risks that BMI overlooks.
script.close: Follow BestKarma for science-backed health without the hype.

visualPlan: Show a scale with BMI numbers and a confused person.
Transition to a DEXA scan machine with visuals of body composition data.
Highlight statistics about muscle mass and longevity.
End with a visual of a healthy lifestyle promoting muscle and bone health.

captions.instagram: BMI isn't the full story of your health. DEXA scans reveal what really matters for longevity. #Health #Longevity #ScienceBacked
captions.facebook: Think BMI tells you everything about your health? Think again. DEXA scans show the real picture of body composition and longevity. #Health #Longevity
captions.tiktok: BMI might mislead you about your health. DEXA scans uncover the truth about your body composition. #Health #Longevity
captions.youtube: Is BMI a reliable health metric? Discover how DEXA scans provide a better understanding of your body composition and longevity.

titles.instagram: Why BMI Can Mislead Your Health

complianceNotes: Do not imply diagnosis or treatment.
Retain at least one meaningful caveat from the article.
